description_long: This is a classic chessboard set on a thick, glossy black base with a marble-like finish. The playing surface features a standard grid of alternating black and white squares, each sharply defined and evenly spaced. The border of the board is wide, black, and polished, providing a luxurious and sturdy frame around the playing area. Both black and white chess pieces are arranged in their starting positions, with each piece rendered in a smooth, reflective material that mimics polished plastic or resin. The chess pieces are traditional Staunton-style, with clear distinctions between pawns, rooks, knights, bishops, queens, and kings. The overall appearance is elegant and suitable for display in upscale urban parks, plazas, or recreational areas.
description: A polished, marble-like chessboard with a glossy black border and classic Staunton chess pieces in black and white, all arranged in starting positions.
description_view_0: The chessboard is viewed from the white side, showing all white pieces in the foreground and black pieces across the board.
description_view_1: The chessboard is viewed from the black side, with black pieces in the foreground and white pieces across the board.
description_view_2: A side view from the left, displaying the full lineup of black pieces on the left and white pieces on the right.
description_view_3: A view from the white side, focusing on the white pieces in the foreground and the black pieces in the background.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface consists of a regular grid of perfectly square tiles, alternating between solid black and solid white, forming a classic checkerboard pattern. The squares are sharply defined with no decorative elements or inscriptions within the grid itself, and the surface appears smooth and highly polished.
attribute_border_design: The border is wide, solid black, and glossy, with a marble-like appearance. It is smooth and unadorned, with no visible ornamentation, inscriptions, or markings, providing a clean and elegant frame around the playing area.
